# Anshul Patel

> Anshul Patel's personal website and blog. Anshul is a Geek, Tinkerer, and Techie with a focus on Cloud Infrastructure, Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), and Artificial Intelligence.

This site contains information about Anshul's professional experience, open-source contributions, speaking engagements at meetups, and a variety of technical blog posts.

## Main Pages

- [About](http://www.anshulpatel.in/about/): Experience summary and skillsets of Anshul Patel.
- [Posts](http://www.anshulpatel.in/posts/): A collection of technical blog posts.
- [Open Source](http://www.anshulpatel.in/oss/): Anshul's contributions to the open-source community.
- [Meetups](http://www.anshulpatel.in/meetups/): Presentations and talks given by Anshul at various meetups.

## Selected Posts

- [SLI, SLO & SLA](http://www.anshulpatel.in/posts/sre_sli_sla_slo/): Understanding key reliability metrics.
- [Building TLDRecap](http://www.anshulpatel.in/posts/building_tldrecap/): Insights into building an AI-powered project.
- [Simple AI Agent Sandbox](http://www.anshulpatel.in/posts/simple_ai_agent_sandbox/): Experimenting with AI agents.
- [Distributed Systems](http://www.anshulpatel.in/posts/distributed_systems/): Concepts and learnings about distributed systems.
- [Chaos Engineering Experiment Design](http://www.anshulpatel.in/posts/chaos_engg_exprmnt_dsgn/): How to design chaos engineering experiments.

## Optional

- [Search](http://www.anshulpatel.in/search/): Search through the blog posts.
- [RSS Feed](http://www.anshulpatel.in/index.xml): Subscribe to updates via RSS.
